title: Introduction Video
description: Impress employers with a short 30-60 second video
uploadHelper: Drag and drop or click to select a video file. Supports MP4, MOV, WebM. Max 50MB.
tip1: Smile and give a friendly greeting
tip2: Introduce your name and work experience (if any)
tip4: Ensure good lighting and clear audio
tooLarge: Video is too large. Limit is 50MB.
